creator: piotr.pietruszewski@intel.com
text: Are you seeing any warnings in dmesg? Does the problem occur with the out-of-tree version of the ix driver (https://downloadcenter.intel.com/download/14688/Intel-Network-Adapters-Driver-for-PCIe-10-Gigabit-Network-Connections-Under-FreeBSD-?product=36773)?
